channel.title: Nail Art Ideas from vivarecipesinspo.github.io/nails
channel.description: A collection of stunning nail art ideas and inspiration.

item.title: Modern Nail Art Ideas Cat Eye Maroon
item.description: Sweet like candy! This sheer and squishy Nail Art Ideas Cat Eye Maroon style is giving us major jelly vibes. Tap our bio link to see how to achieve this translucent look. #jellynails #candynails #sheerpolish #nailgoals #beautytips

item.title: Eye-catching Nails Inspiration Summer
item.description: Mesmerize everyone with this deep, moving Nails Inspiration Summer magnetic polish effect. It looks like velvet on your fingertips! Find the magnet techniques on our website. #magneticnails #velvetnails #mesmerizingart #nailtechniques #beauty

item.title: Unique Nails Design Green And White
item.description: Show off your personality with a unique Nails Design Green And White nail design. Fun, fresh, and absolutely beautiful. Visit our website to see how it's done. #personalitynails #uniquenails #freshstyle #nailartlove #nailaddict

item.title: Elegant Nail Art Simple
item.description: Written in the stars! Channel your zodiac energy with this celestial Nail Art Simple nail art. Find out which colors match your sign on our website. #zodiacnails #celestialart #astrologystyle #magicnails #instanails

item.title: Gorgeous Nail Colors For June And July
item.description: Ground yourself with these beautifully muted Nail Colors For June And July tones. Nature-inspired and perfect for a subtle, everyday glow. Watch the video tutorial on our page! #earthtones #naturenails #subtlestyle #nailcare #neutralnails

item.title: Perfect Nail Art Ideas Green And Gold
item.description: Elevate your aesthetic with this incredible Nail Art Ideas Green And Gold nail inspiration. Flawless finish and undeniable charm. Check out our profile for the complete guide. #aestheticnails #nailinspiration #flawlessfinish #nailcharm #trendsetter

item.title: Cute Nail Colors Spring Pink
item.description: Make your hands the center of attention with this bold Nail Colors Spring Pink art. Creative, chic, and totally captivating. Head to our channel to get inspired. #boldnails #creativeart #chicstyle #captivatingnails #nailgame

item.title: Cute Nails Inspo 2026 Cat Eye Pink
item.description: Bring back the best of the early 2000s with this nostalgic Nails Inspo 2026 Cat Eye Pink set. Totally cute and incredibly fun to wear. Visit our site for the ultimate throwback guide. #y2knails #2000sstyle #nostalgicbeauty #funnails #nailswag
